name: Chocolate Oatmeal Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. For the crust: In a 9-inch pie plate, combine flour, 1 1/2 teaspoons sugar, and 3/4 teaspoon salt. In a small bowl, combine oil and milk. Pour over dry ingredients in the pie plate, stirring until all are moistened. Using your fingers, press pastry evenly over bottom and up sides of the pie plate. Set aside.
2. For the filling: In a medium bowl, beat eggs lightly until combined. Add 1 cup sugar, corn syrup, butter, vanilla, and salt. Beat until just combined. Stir in coconut, oats, and chocolate chips. Pour into crust.
3. Bake at 350°F for 50-55 minutes, until center is almost set when shaken. Cool on a wire rack. Store in the refrigerator. Serves 8.
From Midwest Living, Oct. '94 submitted by Kay Laughlin of Florissant, MO Kim Clegg
